Reference table defining the logbook program for Observe database to be considered in T3 process.

Source: R/data.R
observe_logbook_program.Rd

Reference table defining the logbook program for Observe database to be considered in T3 process.

data(observe_logbook_program, package="t3")

Format

observe_logbook_program: data frame with 29 rows and 3 columns:

  • topiaid: logbook program topiaid, type character.

  • code: program code, type character.

  • label1: program label in English, type numeric.

Examples

data(observe_logbook_program, package="t3")
 observe_logbook_program
#>                                                                    topiaid
#> 1    fr.ird.referential.ps.common.Program#1686418523723#0.6779107415087587
#> 2  fr.ird.referential.ps.common.Program#1712910028020#0.042305269738915796
#> 3   fr.ird.referential.ps.common.Program#1712909866755#0.14694416632125606
#> 4      fr.ird.referential.ps.common.Program#1687453427699#0.45600561446958
#> 5    fr.ird.referential.ps.common.Program#1708965104274#0.9360663761762511
#> 6  fr.ird.referential.ps.common.Program#1686418198061#0.028969129326742893
#> 7     fr.ird.referential.ps.common.Program#1708965054280#0.628800018051336
#> 8    fr.ird.referential.ps.common.Program#1686418563724#0.3458091645701752
#> 9    fr.ird.referential.ps.common.Program#1726732909719#0.5539768483017606
#> 10  fr.ird.referential.ps.common.Program#1726492082043#0.07996395751781671
#> 11   fr.ird.referential.ps.common.Program#1712909995215#0.9034246862669405
#> 12   fr.ird.referential.ps.common.Program#1686418633374#0.6091104168659148
#> 13   fr.ird.referential.ps.common.Program#1726043223649#0.7009857103663292
#> 14   fr.ird.referential.ps.common.Program#1726492368048#0.5164681507213593
#> 15   fr.ird.referential.ps.common.Program#1731686160256#0.2218628119719901
#> 16   fr.ird.referential.ps.common.Program#1726043454198#0.6775744709437909
#> 17   fr.ird.referential.ps.common.Program#1742306567114#0.3279610697320161
#> 18   fr.ird.referential.ps.common.Program#1742306699358#0.7521250472635266
#> 19   fr.ird.referential.ps.common.Program#1742306748063#0.8144485417550063
#> 20  fr.ird.referential.ps.common.Program#1742307215135#0.10188296820927811
#> 21   fr.ird.referential.ps.common.Program#1742307270165#0.1423934943067212
#> 22   fr.ird.referential.ps.common.Program#1726494699541#0.8812018433671981
#> 23  fr.ird.referential.ps.common.Program#1726494644034#0.10598974977677977
#> 24   fr.ird.referential.ps.common.Program#1729643421733#0.5899283478668206
#> 25    fr.ird.referential.ps.common.Program#1726732972356#0.943823545843561
#> 26   fr.ird.referential.ps.common.Program#1742307315794#0.7310389385148582
#> 27   fr.ird.referential.ps.common.Program#1742307615221#0.2890639566367579
#> 28   fr.ird.referential.ps.common.Program#1742307682563#0.3072153441393439
#> 29  fr.ird.referential.ps.common.Program#1742307728624#0.22465347864570984
#>       code                                                  label1
#> 1   IRD-34    Stage 1 - Ongoing Abidjan data acquisitions (France)
#> 2   IRD-42    Stage 2 - Completed Dakar data acquisitions (France)
#> 3   IRD-40 Stage 2 - Completed Victoria data acquisitions (France)
#> 4   IRD-32                       AVDTH Atlantic 1999-2022 (France)
#> 5   IRD-37                           AVDTH Atlantic 2023+ (France)
#> 6   IRD-33                         AVDTH Indian 1999-2022 (France)
#> 7   IRD-38                             AVDTH Indian 2023+ (France)
#> 8   IRD-35      Stage 1 - Ongoing Dakar data acquisitions (France)
#> 9   SFA-80        Stage 1 - Ongoing Victoria acquisitions (Others)
#> 10  SFA-60         Stage 1 - Ongoing Victoria acquisitions (Spain)
#> 11  IRD-41  Stage 2 - Completed Abidjan data acquisitions (France)
#> 12  IRD-36   Stage 1 - Ongoing Victoria data acquisitions (France)
#> 13  SFA-50    Stage 1 - Ongoing Victoria acquisitions (Seychelles)
#> 14  SFA-61       Stage 2 - Completed Victoria acquisitions (Spain)
#> 15  SFA-91                                   AVDTH Indian (Others)
#> 16  SFA-51  Stage 2 - Completed Victoria acquisitions (Seychelles)
#> 17  IRD-92   Stage 3 - Ongoing Abidjan positions checking (France)
#> 18  IRD-93     Stage 3 - Ongoing Dakar positions checking (France)
#> 19  IRD-94  Stage 3 - Ongoing Victoria positions checking (France)
#> 20  IRD-95       Stage 4 - Ongoing Abidjan cross checking (France)
#> 21  IRD-96         Stage 4 - Ongoing Dakar cross checking (France)
#> 22  IEO-71                                    AVDTH Indian (Spain)
#> 23  SFA-70                               AVDTH Indian (Seychelles)
#> 24  IRD-90                         AVDTH Indian 1981-1998 (France)
#> 25  SFA-81      Stage 2 - Completed Victoria acquisitions (Others)
#> 26  IRD-97      Stage 4 - Ongoing Victoria cross checking (France)
#> 27  IRD-98        Stage 5 - Completed Abidjan validations (France)
#> 28  IRD-99          Stage 5 - Completed Dakar validations (France)
#> 29 IRD-100       Stage 5 - Completed Victoria validations (France)

Contents

Developed by Jeanne Clément, Mathieu Depetris, Antoine Duparc, Pascal Cauquil, Laurent Floc’h, Julien Lebranchu, IRD - Ob7 Observatory of Exploited Tropical Pelagic Ecosystems.
